name: spark-html-language-server
description: Language server (LSP) for spark-html single-file components, including spark-ssr pages — diagnostics (undefined bindings, unused imports, script errors, missing key), spark-ssr-aware inferred page data & ambient helpers, semantic highlighting + formatting for <spark-ssr> blocks (SQL, :params, URL/glob/module sources), go-to-definition, prop autocomplete from export let, and hover docs for every directive. Zero runtime dependencies.
